scripts.netlify:build: npm run build && npx shx mkdir -p dist && npx shx cp -r public/* dist/ && npx shx cp -r app dist/ && npx shx cp -r bootstrap dist/ && npx shx cp -r config dist/ && npx shx cp -r database dist/ && npx shx cp -r routes dist/ && npx shx cp -r storage dist/ && npx shx cp artisan dist/ && npx shx cp composer.json dist/ && npx shx cp composer.lock dist/ && npx shx cp .env.example dist/
